title: FSET-494 If you give an adult toy as a joke, he used it so that everyone wouldn't get caught - Fujishima Yui
overview: I gave an adult toy as a joke to my girlfriend who celebrated her birthday. That naive girl doesn't use this! What did you say ... I wondered if I was really interested in it. I secretly started using toys during the night ...! When I witnessed it, I couldn't stand even if I was there ... Only a sullen woman is actually erotic! ?? A girl who can not be obedient is squid with a toy and a meat stick!
